name: polaris-systeminfo-mcp
description: Provide system environment context (OS, architecture, locale, timezone, installed apps) via MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch OS details, timezone, locale, and check installed apps.
interface.longDescription: Allows the AI agent to detect the underlying operating system type, version, architecture, locale, and timezone. It also provides a targeted tool to check if specific applications are installed without scanning the entire file system. Written in pure Python with zero external dependencies.
defaultPrompt: What operating system and architecture am I running on?
What is the system language and timezone?
Check if Google Chrome is installed on this computer.
